Game: Super Noah's Ark 3D 1994-11-25T00:00:00-08:00 It's been a long journey. In just a few days, the ark doors will open and Noah, his family & the animals will be back on dry land. But the animals have become a bit restless and are out of their cages. Camels, giraffes, monkeys, kangaroos and more are wondering throughout the corridors of the ark. As Noah, it's your job to regain order & get the animals to sleep until you leave the ark. You only tool to accomplish this in the food you brought aboard the ark. 1 <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/933b5aea-0869-46f7-bb69-116b54a92675.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/c16636cc-1672-4508-9a8b-8cf523b36b2b.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/ba989652-9622-4855-9a5c-0b50438f9da3.png 2.5 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Super_3D_Noah's_Ark Not Rated Shooter Wisdom Tree Wisdom Tree
